spaceflight.title: Russia Agrees to ISS Operations, Seat-Swaps, Through 2030
spaceflight.summary: During meetings this week with NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman, Roscosmos Director General Dmitry Bakanov agreed that Russia will support operations of the International Space Station through 2030.
